label: FalcoCut QA Agent
summary: Project-local QA automation capabilities extracted from ai-native-qa for requirement drafting, static risk review, UI regression, API checks, and evidence reports.

source_project.label: FalcoCut Knowledge and QA Execution System

capability_sources.name: Requirement to draft cases
capability_sources.summary: Generate draft UI and business test suites plus matching mind-map artifacts from requirements, screenshots, or PRDs.

capability_sources.name: Static regression review
capability_sources.summary: Review historical risks against current frontend, BFF, backend, and config source when live verification is deferred.

capability_sources.name: UI regression execution
capability_sources.summary: Execute QA UI regression after deployment: align requirement, explore real UI, run smoke or reviewed suites, and produce attribution reports.

capability_sources.name: Viral template BFF API testing
capability_sources.summary: Run authorized BFF interface testing with curl, polling, recover-dify checks, and interface reports.

capability_sources.name: Viral template prod UI-only
capability_sources.summary: Compare online snapshot and local material baseline, then submit only reviewed newly added templates through UI-only workflow.

capability_sources.name: Viral template workflow testing
capability_sources.summary: Run QA full workflow testing for user-visible result, generated assets, watermark, refund, and end-to-end acceptance.

commands.label: Run static regression review
commands.summary: Use the project-local static-regression-review skill to inspect source-only regression risk.
commands.command: codex --cd /Users/xy/xykj/ai-native-qa "Use agent_skills/static-regression-review/SKILL.md to review the provided change scope."

commands.label: Run UI regression
commands.summary: Use the project-local UI regression execution skill after human-reviewed scope approval.
commands.command: codex --cd /Users/xy/xykj/ai-native-qa "Use agent_skills/ui-regression-execution/SKILL.md to run the reviewed UI regression scope."

commands.label: Inventory prod template scope
commands.summary: Prepare viral-template prod UI-only scope inventory before any reviewed submit action.
commands.command: codex --cd /Users/xy/xykj/ai-native-qa "Use agent_skills/viral-template-prod-ui-only/SKILL.md in inventory mode for the provided template scope."

hooks.label: Prepare QA execution context
hooks.summary: When a delivery is accepted, prepare a QA agent prompt from task, attachments, selected skills, and approval policy.

constraints.label: Reviewed case gate
constraints.summary: Only reviewed test scope can be executed as formal QA evidence.

constraints.label: UI evidence must come from UI
constraints.summary: UI regression evidence cannot be replaced by mutation API calls.

constraints.label: Production submit requires approval
constraints.summary: Production submit, payment-impacting flows, delete, and rename actions require explicit human approval.
